description: Educational 3D graphics application demonstrating Translation and Rotation operations using Python and PyOpenGL with GLUT windowing

userStories.title: Set up OpenGL window with GLUT and perspective camera
userStories.description: As a user, I want the program to open an 800x600 window with a perspective camera positioned diagonally so I can see the full 3D scene.
acceptanceCriteria: Window opens at 800x600 resolution using GLUT
Perspective projection is configured (not orthographic)
Camera is positioned diagonally relative to origin so all axes are visible
Background is cleared to black each frame
ESC key closes the application
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Render color-coded 3D coordinate axes
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see three color-coded axes crossing at the origin so I can understand the 3D coordinate system.
acceptanceCriteria: X axis rendered as a line in red (1,0,0)
Y axis rendered as a line in green (0,1,0)
Z axis rendered as a line in blue (0,0,1)
All three axes cross at origin (0,0,0)
Axes extend far enough in both positive and negative directions to be clearly visible
Axis labels X, Y, Z are rendered as text near the positive ends
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Place 6 cubes at axis extremities with offset
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see 6 cubes placed at the positive and negative ends of each axis so I can visualize translation in 3D space.
acceptanceCriteria: 6 cubes are rendered in the scene
One cube at each position: +X, -X, +Y, -Y, +Z, -Z
Each cube has a visible offset/gap from the axis lines (cubes do not touch the axes)
Cubes are clearly distinguishable from the axes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Animate cubes rotating around their respective axes
userStories.description: As a user, I want each pair of cubes to continuously rotate around their corresponding axis so I can understand rotation transformations.
acceptanceCriteria: Cubes at +X and -X rotate exclusively around the X axis
Cubes at +Y and -Y rotate exclusively around the Y axis
Cubes at +Z and -Z rotate exclusively around the Z axis
All 6 cubes rotate at the same angular velocity
Animation starts automatically when the program launches
Animation is continuous and does not stop
Animation targets 60 FPS using a GLUT timer callback
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement arrow key camera orbit controls
userStories.description: As a user, I want to orbit the camera around the scene using arrow keys so I can explore the 3D environment from different angles.
acceptanceCriteria: Left/Right arrow keys orbit the camera horizontally around the origin
Up/Down arrow keys orbit the camera vertically around the origin
Camera movement is smooth and responsive
All objects and axes remain visible during orbiting
Typecheck passes
